title: Tessarected
description: An RPG mod with skill tree's, class systems, spell and ability systems and way more!
body:
Tessarected: A Shattered Legacy
An immersive RPG overhaul for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Fabric)

🌟 Overview
Step into a world torn apart by the Great Sundering, where floating islands drift through unstable rifts of chaotic energy. The planet's heart—the Tessarected Cores—has shattered into countless fragments, leaving behind a broken reality where only the bold survive.

Choose your destiny among four distinct paths: become a Mender healing the world's wounds, a Harvester seeking ultimate power, a Guardian defending order, or embrace the chaos as an Echo—a twisted being born from the Sundering itself.

⚔️ Core Features

🎭 Class System & Character Progression

4 Unique Classes with distinct playstyles and philosophies
Custom Attribute System,
Deep Leveling System with meaningful choices at every level
Skill Trees that unlock powerful passive bonuses

💫 Advanced Combat & Magic

Custom Resource System: Health, Mana, and Stamina management
Spell Casting: Powerful abilities mapped to Z, X, C, V keys
Enhanced Combat: Critical hits, resistances, and attribute-based damage
Class-Specific Abilities: Each path offers unique active and passive powers

🌍 The Four Paths

🌱 Mender - The Healer

Feel the planet's pain and dedicate yourself to healing the world's wounds. Stabilize chaotic rifts, purify blighted lands, and restore balance through compassion and understanding.

⚡ Harvester - The Power Seeker

Embrace the Sundering as opportunity. Absorb Tessarected Core fragments, accumulate raw power, and reshape reality according to your will—no matter the cost.

🛡️ Guardian - The Protector

Stand as a bulwark against chaos. Defend the innocent, maintain order, and prevent the world's further decay through vigilance and tactical prowess.

🌪️ Echo - The Chaos Born

Mysterious beings twisted by the Sundering's energies. Manipulate reality itself, corrupt the world around you, and embody the very chaos that threatens all existence.

🔧 Technical Details
Minecraft Version: 1.20.1
Mod Loader: Fabric
Client/Server: Both sides required
Dependencies: Fabric API

📜 Lore: The Great Sundering

Long ago, the world was whole. The Tessarected Cores pulsed at its heart, maintaining perfect harmony between matter and energy. But something went wrong. In a cataclysmic event known as the Great Sundering, reality itself fractured.

Now, floating islands drift through unstable rifts, twisted creatures guard chaotic regions, and the planet's very soul bleeds Tessarected energy. The choice is yours: will you heal this broken world, exploit its chaos for power, defend what remains, or become one with the corruption itself?

🚀 Key Highlights

✅ Complete RPG Overhaul - Transform Minecraft into a full RPG experience

✅ 4 Distinct Classes - Each with unique abilities and progression paths

✅ Custom Magic System - Dozens of spells with strategic resource management

✅ Immersive Lore - Rich backstory woven throughout gameplay

✅ Polished UI - Professional interfaces for all RPG systems

✅ Balanced Progression - Meaningful choices at every level

Experience the Shattered Legacy. Choose your path. Reshape the world.
